title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do you usually keep in touch with friends who live far away?
Do you think it's important to have a wide circle of friends or a few close ones?
How much time do you spend with your family each week?
What do you and your friends usually do when you get together?
Have you made any close friends through studying or working?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: What do you think is the most important quality in a close friend?
Do you think it's more difficult to make real friendships today than in the past?
How important is it to you to stay connected with people from your past?
